ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fighters" (
  "fighter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fighter */,
  "fighter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fighter */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or gym associated with the fighter */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class of the fighter */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fighter */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the fighter */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the fighter */,
  "reach" TEXT /* Reach of the fighter */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak of the fighter */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the fighter */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the fighter */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws by the fighter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fighter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fight_stats" (
  "fight_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight statistic entry */,
  "fighter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fighter */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent fighter */,
  "significant_strikes" TEXT /* Significant strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "significant_strikes_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of significant strikes landed */,
  "head_strikes" TEXT /* Head strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "body_strikes" TEXT /* Body strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "leg_strikes" TEXT /* Leg strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "distance_strikes" TEXT /* Distance strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "clinch_strikes" TEXT /* Clinch strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "ground_strikes" TEXT /* Ground strikes landed by the fighter */,
  "fight_date" TEXT /* Date of the fight */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight */,
  "takedowns" INTEGER /* Number of takedowns */,
  "takedown_accuracy" TEXT /* Percentage of successful takedowns */,
  "submission_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of submission attempts */,
  "submission_success" INTEGER /* Number of successful submissions */,
  "knockdowns" INTEGER /* Number of knockdowns */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time of the fight */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the fight */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision of the fight */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class of the fight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fight_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_stats_fight_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_id") REFERENCES fights ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_stats_fighter_id FOREIGN KEY ("fighter_id") REFERENCES fighters ("fighter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_stats_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES fighters ("fighter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fighter, coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team or gym */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fights" (
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight */,
  "fighter_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first fighter */,
  "fighter_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second fighter */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the fight event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the fight event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the fight event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the fight (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of the fight (e.g., KO, TKO, Decision, Submission) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the fight ended */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round in which the fight ended */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class of the fight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_fighter_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("fighter_1_id") REFERENCES fighters ("fighter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_fighter_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("fighter_2_id") REFERENCES fighters ("fighter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "fighter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fighter being reviewed */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score given to the fighter (e.g., out of 10) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the fighter's performance */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_fight_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_id") REFERENCES fights ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_fighter_id FOREIGN KEY ("fighter_id") REFERENCES fighters ("fighter_id")
)
